$comment: 10-PR sample for cr-loop experiment (#1811). Picked across size + history-of-noise. Each PR's findings + verdicts are extracted by scripts/enrich-pr-set.ts using the structured bot review format + our /reply-to-code-review JSON sidecars (already labelled as TRUE/FALSE × FIX/DEFER/IGNORE).

selectionCriteria.medium: 100-500 LOC with linked issue + multi-round reviews — the realistic case
selectionCriteria.large: >= 500 LOC across multiple subsystems — bundling stress test
selectionCriteria.noisy: PRs where verdicts include >=1 FALSE/IGNORE — recurrence-check target

prs.title: fix(auth): set Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy for Firebase popup sign-in
prs.rationale: tiny fix, no linked issue — pipeline sanity check

prs.title: fix(e2e): harness setup nav uses domcontentloaded, not networkidle
fix(mcp): security scoping for skills and code-review
prs.rationale: linked to issue #1777, security topic, multi-round reviews

prs.title: fix(mcp): consistency in response formats and test mocks
fix(mcp): logic errors in epics and task routing
prs.rationale: same area as #1781 — tests cross-PR recurrence detection

prs.title: fix(#1789): unblock Code Review Quality dashboard pipeline
feat(code-review): reviews accordion + IA polish (PR detail + list + sidebar)
prs.rationale: multi-domain UI change, has the formatNumber FALSE-positive (round-1 finding [3]) — pure noisy/recurrence target

prs.title: fix(code-review): unify on PullRequest shape, converge on org-scoped storage
prs.rationale: foundational refactor, multi-round reviews, mix of TRUE/FALSE verdicts

prs.title: feat(code-review): rebuild PR detail header to match mock
prs.rationale: has confirmed FP from bot ('BigQuery-powered metrics' + formatNumber identical claim) — recurrence target

prs.title: fix(#1802): code review findings + reviews land in BigQuery
prs.rationale: linked to issue #1802, recent bot review with deferred MINOR (publishFinding re-fetches PR) — tests whether enriched skill defers correctly
